title: Better Title Screen
description: Better Title Screen is a client-side mod that provides options to customize Minecraft's title screen.
body:
![Better Title Screen banner](http://i.imgur.com/pOx7CVF.png)

Better Title Screen is a client-side mod that provides options to customize Minecraft's title screen. 

The main feature of Better Title Screen is the ability to add custom text to the title screen including support for colored text and multiple lines. Better Title Screen can also be used to turn off the info shown on the title screen like the current versions of Minecraft and the current number of loaded mods.

 

![Better Title Screen screenshot](http://i.imgur.com/miEOMIS.png)

_This is an example of how your title screen could look, with Better Title Screen._

 

_**Bug reports**_

Found any bugs in Better Title Screen?

Please report it on: https://github.com/GirafiStudios/BetterTitleScreen/issues

 

_**Modpack permissions**_

Feel free to use Better Title Screen in any kind of modpack, as long as you link back to this page and don’t make any money of the modpack.

 

**_Special thanks to_**

Grindoff - For making the Better Title Screens banner.
